case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LARRY FLORES PRIETO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $83.00 SERVED AUG-22-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PRIETO, LARRY FLORES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRIETO, LARRY FLORES $520.08 PRINCIPAL, $83.36 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $688.44, $506.08 IN UNPAID PRINCIPAL PLUS $14.00 LATE FEE PLUS INTEREST ON PRINCIPAL ONLY AT CONTRACT RATE FROM 05/03/2018. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $637.51 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRIETO, LARRY FLORES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LARRY FLORES PRIETO DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
